Plaintiffs Notice And Motion To Compel Depositions Of Db Riley, Inc.S Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable; Imposition Of Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Barry K. Matson for plaintiff and moving party: Patricia Rockett, Marcel Rockett, Christine Rockett and Bianca Rockett

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Patricia Rockett, Marcel Rockett, Christine Rockett and Bianca Rockett's motion to compel the deposition of the person most knowledgeable is granted. The parties are to meet and confer as to scheduling the deposition at a mutually convenient time. The deposition shall be completed by November 30, 2006. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
